description_long: This grand theater building features an ornate facade with classical columns, arched windows, and intricate sculptural details. The structure is crowned by a large central dome with a golden statue at its peak, flanked by two smaller domes on either side. The main entrance is accentuated by a set of double doors beneath a decorative balcony, and the facade is richly adorned with reliefs and ornamental motifs. The roof is clad in a pale blue-green material, likely copper or metal, which has developed a patina over time. Large windows line the sides and rear, allowing natural light into the interior spaces. The overall design is symmetrical and monumental, reflecting a historic and prestigious architectural style.
description: A grand, ornate theater with a central dome, sculptural facade, and classical architectural details, featuring a pale blue-green roof and prominent entrance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance with double doors, two smaller domes, and the central dome topped by a golden statue.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the elongated structure, large windows, and the profile of the domes and roof.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the symmetrical arrangement of large windows and the back of the central dome.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with similar features to view 1, showing the building's depth and side ornamentation.
attribute_facade_ornamentation: The facade is richly decorated with sculptural reliefs, classical columns, ornate cornices, and a prominent golden statue atop the central dome, reflecting elaborate craftsmanship and historic motifs.
